data_request.notes: Fetch Alphabet (GOOGL) 10-K and 10-Q data covering 2025 and early 2026 to assess profitability, liquidity, and cash flow health.

agent_response: You're asking for Alphabet (GOOGL) market performance in the last quarter (Q4 2025) and its financial health from earnings reports. I’m pulling two data streams: (1) market data for XNAS|GOOGL covering 2025-10-01 to 2025-12-31 (OHLCV with 7d_avg and 30d_avg) to compute quarterly return, intraquarter highs/lows, and volatility signals; (2) Alphabet’s latest GAAP filings (10-K and 10-Q) for 2025 and early 2026 to extract Revenues, NetIncome, EPS, Assets, Liabilities, Equity, Cash Flows From Operations, and Capital Expenditures. With these, I’ll deliver a concise, data-backed view of Q4 2025 market performance and 2025-2026 financial health to inform investment considerations. Ultimate goal: provide a clear, actionable assessment of Alphabet’s quarter and full-year fundamentals.
